Bus Timings

Guide to Bus 308 Route and Stops: Sharjah to Jebel Ali

February 17, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 308 is a vital transportation service connecting Sharjah with Jebel Ali, providing passengers with a reliable and convenient option for traveling between these key areas. Operating daily, Bus 308 serves a range of stops and facilitates smooth transit between Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah and Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket.

Route Name 308
Route Description Al Rolla Terminal - Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket
Total Distance Approximately 46.8 km
Total Journey Time Approximately 1.5 hours
Operational Hours 05:30 to 23:35 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 15
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus Timings

The bus operates at regular intervals throughout the day. Below are the departure times from both ends of the route:

  • From Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket: 07:40, 08:10, 08:40, 09:10, 09:40, 10:10, 10:40, 11:10, 11:40, 12:10, 12:40, 13:10, 13:40, 14:10, 14:40, 15:10, 15:40, 16:10, 16:40, 17:10, 17:40, 18:15, 18:50, 19:20, 19:55, 20:25, 21:00, 21:30, 22:05, 22:35, 23:05, 23:35

Also See: Bus 111 in Abu Dhabi: Route Map and Stops

Bus Ticket Price

As of the latest available information, the standard fare for Bus 308 is AED 15. This price provides a cost-effective way to travel between Sharjah and Jebel Ali, ensuring that passengers can enjoy a comfortable journey without incurring high costs.

Bus Booking

Currently, there are no specific online booking options available for Bus 308. Passengers can simply board the bus at any of the designated stops. For the most updated information on bus services and ticketing, checking local transportation websites or contacting customer service may provide additional details.

Bus Route

The Bus 308 route runs between Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah and Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket. Here are the key stops along the way:

  1. Al Rolla Terminal

  2. Al Jubail Bus Terminal · 8

  3. Ibn Battuta Bus Station · 7

  4. Jebel Ali Free Zone, Main Gate

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket

This route covers essential transit hubs and commercial centers, making it an effective option for reaching major destinations.

Explore the bus schedule and fare details for your journey from Sharjah to Salalah.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Several notable attractions and destinations are located along the Bus 308 route:

  1. Al Rolla Terminal, Sharjah: This area is near the heart of Sharjah and offers access to several cultural and historic sites such as the Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilization and the Sharjah Arts Museum.

  2. Al Jubail Bus Terminal, Sharjah: Close to the Jubail Souq, a bustling marketplace that provides a glimpse into traditional Emirati culture and local shopping.

  3. Ibn Battuta Bus Station, Dubai: Located near Ibn Battuta Mall, a large shopping and entertainment complex themed after the travels of the famous explorer Ibn Battuta. It features a variety of shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

4.

5.

These stops provide a mix of cultural, shopping, and recreational experiences, making Bus 308 a useful route for both locals and visitors exploring these regions.

Read More: Detailed Route and Stops for Bus 17 in Dubai

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket, the furthest point on the 308 bus route starting from Al Rolla Terminal, with a price range of AED 144-171. This convenient option allows you to reach your destination comfortably while enjoying the flexibility and ease of booking through the app. Whether you’re heading to shop at Parco Hypermarket or exploring the surrounding areas, Careem provides a reliable and hassle-free way to complete your journey.

Whether you’re traveling for work, visiting key commercial areas, or commuting between Sharjah and Jebel Ali, Bus 308 offers a reliable and economical solution to meet your transportation needs. With frequent service and affordable fares, it ensures a smooth and efficient journey throughout the day.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 17, 2026.
